pathways.name: Swift 3 Migration Path
pathways.description: Master Swift 3's massive source-breaking release. Start with the new language features, internalize the API Design Guidelines that drove the Grand Renaming, then go deep on performance and the Foundation value-type modernization.

pathways.name: SiriKit Integration Path
pathways.description: Bring third-party voice control to your app via Siri. Learn the intent/domain model, build the Intents and Intents UI extensions, then surface your app system-wide via NSUserActivity donations.

pathways.name: iMessage Apps & Stickers Path
pathways.description: Ship your first iMessage app to the new Messages App Store. Start with sticker packs (zero code), graduate to programmatic sticker UIs, then build interactive collaborative messages.

pathways.name: CallKit & VoIP Path
pathways.description: Make your VoIP app a first-party citizen. Adopt CallKit for native incoming-call UI, integrate with Recents/Favorites/Contacts, and combine with SiriKit for hands-free calling.

pathways.name: watchOS 3 Performance Path
pathways.description: Build an instant-launch, glanceable, responsive watch app. Master the new app lifecycle, Background App Refresh for snapshot/complication updates, and the 2-second-task design discipline.

pathways.name: iOS 10 Notifications Path
pathways.description: Adopt the new UserNotifications framework. Learn the unified delegate model, then add rich media attachments, content extensions for custom UI, and service extensions for end-to-end-encrypted pushes.

pathways.name: Speech Framework Path
pathways.description: Add voice-driven features to your app with the new Speech framework. Recognize live mic or pre-recorded audio, handle privacy authorization, and respect the throttling/duration limits.

pathways.name: Apple Pay Everywhere Path
pathways.description: Take Apple Pay beyond the iOS app. Add Apple Pay to your Safari website with the new JavaScript API, then bring it to watchOS, iMessage extensions, and SiriKit/Maps ride-sharing extensions.

pathways.name: Privacy & Differential Privacy Path
pathways.description: Engineer privacy into your app from the ground up. Understand identifier hygiene, differential privacy for crowd-sourced learning, the new Info.plist permission requirements, and pasteboard/widget data discipline.

pathways.name: Photos & Camera Modernization Path
pathways.description: Migrate to the new AVCapturePhotoOutput API. Capture Live Photos and RAW DNGs in your app, then add Live Photo editing via the new PhotoKit context.

pathways.name: Wide Color (Display P3) Path
pathways.description: Adopt Display P3 wide-color rendering across your asset pipeline, drawing code, and color picking. Learn extended-range sRGB and the new UIGraphicsImageRenderer.

pathways.name: HomeKit Cameras & Home App Path
pathways.description: Adopt the new HomeKit camera, doorbell, and air-treatment categories. Use HMCameraProfile for streaming/snapshot, the simplified single-API setup flow, and rich notifications for doorbell-camera combos.

pathways.name: Search APIs & Spotlight Path
pathways.description: Make your app's content discoverable via Spotlight. Layer Core Spotlight, NSUserActivity, and Universal Links indexing; opt into Continue-Search-in-App; use the Core Spotlight Search API for in-app search.

pathways.name: UIKit Animations & 3D Touch Path
pathways.description: Adopt UIViewPropertyAnimator for interruptible animations and view-controller transitions. Use UIPreviewInteraction to add 3D-Touch micro-interactions with your own custom UI.
